Premium Corduroy Fabric: Upholstered in high-quality, soft-brushed corduroy, this sofa offers a uniquely inviting texture that is both durable and long-lasting. The robust fabric resists daily wear and tear, ensuring the rich color and plush feel remain vibrant and new-looking for years to come, adding a touch of timeless elegance to your decor.
Spring & Foam Hybrid Cushioning: Enjoy lasting comfort and resilience with our advanced cushion filling. Each seat combines supportive pocket springs with high-resilience foam, creating a perfect balance of softness and firmness. This premium construction prevents sagging over time, ensuring the sofa retains its shape and provides cloud-like support even after years of use.
Easy Setup, No Assembly Required: Your comfort begins the moment your sofa arrives. Designed for ultimate convenience, it requires no tools or complicated assembly. Simply unbox the modules, position them in your desired layout, and fluff the cushions. In 72 hours, your photogenic and incredibly comfortable new sofa is ready to enjoy.
